items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years of age.
items.quote: Now Gibson is 38 years of age fighting at 135 pounds.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's chin is questionable following his 21-second knockout loss to Aoriqileng.
items.quote: Gibson's chin don't know where it's at because of his last loss where he got knocked out by our kilong in 20 seconds.

items.claim: Cody Gibson lacks the strength at 38 years old to control other bantamweights in the clinch or grappling exchanges.
items.quote: At 38, I don't think Gibson's all that strong anymore. Again, I try to say that respectfully.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a 15-2 professional record.
Abdul Hussein's only career losses are to Muhammad Mokaev and Nariman Abbasov.
items.quote: And the only career losses for Abdul Hussein are Mame, sorry, Muhammad Mokayv back in 2021 in Brave and Narwas Abska in Brave in 2018.

items.claim: Mike Davis struggles with activity and does not fight very often in his UFC career.
items.quote: The problem with Mike Davis is well that's his entire UFC career because he doesn't fight that often.
